title: UANI Exposes IRGC Nuclear Sanctions Evasion Network

contents:
## UANI Exposes IRGC Nuclear Sanctions Evasion Network

### Overview
UANI reveals IRGC-linked entities evade U.S. sanctions on Iran nuclear program. Network procures restricted materials for missile development. U.S. Treasury targets evasion tactics in latest action.

### Event Details
UANI reports extensive IRGC compliance evasion schemes targeting nuclear and missile programs. IRGC operatives utilize front companies in UAE, Turkey, and China to procure carbon fiber, maraging steel, and sodium perchlorate—critical components for ballistic missiles and potential nuclear delivery systems. Treasury Department designates 17 entities and 21 individuals this week, disrupting procurement networks that ship dual-use goods to Iran. UANI highlights Quds Force Unit 190 oversees operations, routing funds through cryptocurrency and hawala systems to dodge financial restrictions. Sanctions block millions in transactions, expose Dubai-based shell firms, and target ship-to-ship transfers off Oman coast. Iran accelerates enrichment to 60% purity levels despite IAEA rebukes, stockpiles exceed JCPOA limits by 30 times. UANI urges allies enforce snapback sanctions, intensify vessel inspections, and pursue secondary sanctions on complicit banks. Network demonstrates IRGC resilience post-Soleimani, adapts routes via Southeast Asia. U.S. intelligence tracks 50+ vessels in shadow fleet, intercepts two shipments last month. Evasion persists despite maximum pressure campaign, fuels regional tensions with Israel, Saudi Arabia. UANI calls immediate action halt Tehran's nuclear breakout capacity within weeks.

### Source Context
@UANI (United Against Nuclear Iran) covers this category of developments. The account focuses on uani iran nuclear sanctions irgc compliance designation evasion.
